claude.note: Headless Claude Code. Skills auto-load from .claude/skills; project CLAUDE.md supplies the operating notes. Tighten --permission-mode to acceptEdits if full autonomy is not wanted.

codex.note: Headless Codex CLI (>=0.144, ChatGPT auth). Skills live in ~/.codex/skills (technology-company-profit-forecasting + trainer, Codex port). --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox is the headless parity of claude's bypassPermissions AND required because the user's approvals_reviewer=guardian_subagent hangs unattended runs. Run DIRECT - the v2rayN proxy (127.0.0.1:10808) stalls codex; do not add proxy env back without re-testing.

prompts.live_forecast: Use the technology-company-profit-forecasting skill. Run a complete live_forecast delivery for {entity} ({security}) with as_of={as_of}. Create the run workspace at {workspace} using the skill's scripts/scaffold_delivery.py, then follow the mandatory full-model execution contract end to end: point-in-time Source Pack, forward-evidence SignalCards, mechanism-based model, formula-driven workbook at model/model.xlsx, source-backed report.md, independent red team, research-completeness and strict delivery validators, immutable snapshot. Finish only when validate_delivery.py --strict passes, or deliver not-decision-ready with every failed gate listed. Before freezing the snapshot, fill forecast_snapshot.json's valuation_summary block: current_price (with price_as_of and currency), current_valuation_note, fair_value bear/base/bull, recommended_buy_price, action (buy/hold/watch/avoid), and one_line_thesis - the dashboard reads these fields. Obey the project AGENTS.md operating notes. {extra} In forecast_snapshot.json fill every outputs block with the canonical evaluable keys revenue_point/revenue_low/revenue_high and profit_point/profit_low/profit_high (GAAP net income) plus point_evaluable (scenario periods: base->point, bear->low, bull->high; extra metrics welcome as additional keys). Produce at least 6 SignalCards using the controlled source_family slugs, spanning >=3 families with >=1 independent family (industry-research / technical-paper-standard / expert-field / news-event). Honesty and rigor rules: record method_commit in run_manifest.json via git -C forecasting-skills rev-parse --short HEAD; content_hash only when actually computed (otherwise unhashed:<reason>) and never fabricate URLs; quantify every modeled driver row with numbers per year (volume, ASP, share), not prose; the workbook must be genuinely formula-driven (cell formulas, no broken references); include report sections for 买入纪律 (derive the recommended buy price with margin-of-safety logic) and 一致性检查 (implied tax rate, segment sums, EPS x shares); resolve or readiness-cap every open P0/P1 red-team finding before finishing.
prompts.training_case: Use the technology-company-forecasting-trainer skill. Execute one historical training case: entity={entity} ({security}), as_of={as_of}, round_id={round_id}, case_role={case_role}, workspace={workspace}. Scaffold with the skill's scripts/scaffold_training_run.py, research strictly inside the time sandbox (only sources published at or before as_of, no answer-bearing queries), seal with freeze_training_forecast.py BEFORE retrieving any target actuals, then retrieve actuals and score with score_training_forecast.py. Keep {runs_root}/{round_id}/round.json honest. Check {runs_root}/control.json before starting; if auto_training is pause, stop cleanly and say so. Populate valuation_summary in the snapshot when price data at the as_of date is available. Do not modify the skills repo in this run. {extra} In forecast_snapshot.json fill every outputs block with the canonical evaluable keys revenue_point/revenue_low/revenue_high and profit_point/profit_low/profit_high (GAAP net income) plus point_evaluable (scenario periods: base->point, bear->low, bull->high; extra metrics welcome as additional keys). Produce at least 6 SignalCards using the controlled source_family slugs, spanning >=3 families with >=1 independent family (industry-research / technical-paper-standard / expert-field / news-event). Honesty and rigor rules: record method_commit in run_manifest.json via git -C forecasting-skills rev-parse --short HEAD; content_hash only when actually computed (otherwise unhashed:<reason>) and never fabricate URLs; quantify every modeled driver row with numbers per year (volume, ASP, share), not prose; the workbook must be genuinely formula-driven (cell formulas, no broken references); include report sections for 买入纪律 (derive the recommended buy price with margin-of-safety logic) and 一致性检查 (implied tax rate, segment sums, EPS x shares); resolve or readiness-cap every open P0/P1 red-team finding before finishing.
prompts.training_round: Use the technology-company-forecasting-trainer skill. Run one full training round exactly per references/historical-training-loop.md. round_id={round_id}; Group A (training) = {group_a}; Group B (untouched validation) = {group_b}; workspaces under {runs_root}/{round_id}/. Record round.json with the base method commit before starting. The sandbox is absolute: seal every forecast before its actuals. Train on A with mechanism-level rule changes only, validate on B; on a clean pass rebuild the live skill with build_live_release.py --self-test, run the test suite, commit and push; on failure run the swap fold (retrain on B, re-validate on A, compare closeness); if still inconsistent, revert to the base commit and record the round abandoned. Check {runs_root}/control.json before each case and between fold phases; pause means finish the current step and stop. {extra} You ARE authorized to edit the skills repository as part of this loop - that is the loop's purpose: make mechanism-level rule edits in the trainer's references/, run its test suite (python3 -m pytest tests inside the trainer skill), and git commit locally with a message describing the rule (not the case answers); push only after Group B validation passes. Do not stop to ask for permission; this authorization is standing for training rounds. When judging Group B (and any swap fold), record the structured fold_review block in round.json per references/historical-training-loop.md - five fields (target_error_recurred, new_systematic_bias, intervals_silently_widened, right_reason_ok, regression_ok) each backed by one line of evidence; never a bare pass.
prompts.plan_round: Use the technology-company-forecasting-trainer skill. You are the training planner - plan only, do not run any forecast. Read the curriculum at assets/benchmarks/training_curriculum_v80.csv (waves of development/untouched_holdout pairs) and the existing rounds under {runs_root}. Propose the next round as four companies: pick two unused pairs from the earliest unfinished wave - the two development cases become Group A (training), the two untouched holdouts become Group B (validation). Skip companies already exposed in finished or abandoned rounds. Write {runs_root}/<round-id>/round.json (round-id: use {round_id} if given, otherwise the next free round-N) with status planned, base_method_commit (git rev-parse HEAD of the skills repo), group_a and group_b entries (entity, security, as_of from proposed_as_of, case_id security@as_of, role), and notes explaining why these four and what mechanism the round stresses. Then print the plan as JSON in your final message. {extra}
prompts.suggest_watch: You are the stock-research assistant for the technology-company forecasting dashboard. This is a WATCHLIST SUGGESTION task only - do NOT run any forecast, do NOT use the trainer skill, do NOT modify any file except the one output file named below. Current watchlist (JSON): {watchlist} . User direction hint (may be empty; if given, follow it): {hint} . Task: recommend 5-8 US-listed technology companies that are NOT already on the watchlist, as candidate additions. Selection principles: span DIFFERENT economic mechanisms covered by the technology-company-profit-forecasting skill (memory/storage cycle, semiconductor equipment/WFE, foundry/advanced nodes, materials, networking/optical interconnect, custom silicon, servers/power/cooling, cloud platforms, subscription software, internet platforms); prefer companies whose profit drivers those mechanism modules can model well, and note briefly why each fits. Verify each ticker is the correct primary US listing (web search allowed, keep it quick). Write EXACTLY ONE file: {suggestions_path} - a JSON object with fields: generated_at (current UTC ISO timestamp), hint (echo the hint), suggestions (array; each item has entity = official English company name, security = US ticker, note = one Chinese sentence <=40 chars giving the mechanism-fit reason, no price targets). Overwrite the file if it exists. Finish within a few minutes.

quotes.note: Set proxy to e.g. http://127.0.0.1:10808 if Yahoo is unreachable directly.
